content.en:
The Half-Tooth Master nodded, "It did, but it was a long time ago. "

"Did you find out who did it at the time?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Heaven Swallowing Sect!" The half-tooth master said with a look of fear: "This is a very terrifying sect, originating from the Origin Realm Sea, a long time ago, when I was only a five-domain level controller, and this incident happened in many boundary rivers, and then it attracted the attention of some big forces in the Origin Realm Sea, and only then began to investigate in detail, and finally found out that the Heaven Swallowing Sect did it." By that time, more than 100,000 Eternal Masters had been killed. In the end, the major forces besieged and killed the Soul Swallowing Sect. Although the Soul Devouring Sect is powerful, it is not very powerful after all. It is said that the first leader of the Soul Devouring Sect is Tu Huang, a disciple of Hei Zu, who is a Nine Realm-level controller, and was eventually killed by a Ten-Realm level master. And because of this incident, Black Ancestor was sealed by a great being who had surpassed the Ten Realms level. "

"Black Ancestor was sealed because of this incident!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Immediately, he was curious again: "So, the Lives Devouring Sect is gone?"

"It's indeed gone!" affirmed, "Almost all of the masters of the Half-Tooth Sect have been killed, and they have been investigated by the Great Being himself, and none of them have escaped, and all of them have been killed. Now that something similar has happened, it is very likely that it was started by a certain force that had obtained the inheritance of the Heaven Devouring Sect. "

"Why did the Heaven Devouring Sect do this, could it be that they had great benefit in killing those Eternal Masters?" Ye Tian asked.

The half-tooth master nodded: "It is indeed a great benefit, it is said that the Heaven Devouring Sect has a terrifying secret technique called the Heaven Snatching Technique, which can devour an eternal master and deprive the other party of the perception of the change of the Dao. There may not be many changes in the Dao of an Eternal Master, but when there are many people, there will be more changes in the Dao obtained. This is a shortcut, which is why the Eternal Masters of the Heavenly Sect in the first place are so crazy. "

"And this secret technique?"

Ye Tian was dumbfounded, if there were really Eternal Controllers who had obtained this secret technique, how many would be able to endure it?

After all, many Eternal Masters have been enlightening for countless years, but they have not made any progress, if they have obtained this secret technique and do not need to cultivate themselves, they will naturally have to find a way to devour other Eternal Masters and plunder their changes and perceptions above the Dao!

"From this point of view, this time, it is very likely that the forces that had obtained the Heaven Snatching Secret Technique couldn't help it, so they attacked the other Eternal Controllers!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

It is also possible that the other party has done this a long time ago, but at the beginning it was done slowly, and it would kill an eternal master every long time, and now that the other party's strength has reached a bottleneck, he can't help it, and he frantically starts to slaughter one eternal master after another.

Moreover, this kind of thing may not only be carried out in the thirteenth boundary river, but the other party may also start in other boundary rivers and scatter them, so it will not attract much attention.

Ye Tian didn't know what the strength of the other party was, if he was only a seventh-realm level controller, he could still use the Ten Thousand Phases statue to fight one or two, but if he was an eight-realm level controller, he could pinch himself to death with just one hand, and he could even rush into the void area at the cost and kill his own deity.

"It has to be reported to Wanyuanshan. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, after he separated from the half-tooth master, he immediately entered Wanyuan Mountain and reported the matter to the Shizun Ten Elements Ancestor.

"Apprentice, don't bother with being a teacher for this little matter, go find your fourth senior sister Snow Girl. "

Ten Xingzu said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, Ye Tian came to find the Snow Girl.

"Little junior brother, please be seated. "

The Snow Maiden welcomed Ye Tian into her residence.

"Fourth Senior Sister, I'm here to ask you for help. Ye Tian pleaded.

"What's the matter?"

Snow Girl asked.

Immediately, Ye Tian told the matter of the Heaven Swallowing Sect.

"I told the Master, but the Master said it was a small matter, so he asked me to come to you. "

When the Snow Girl heard that it was the Heaven Swallowing Sect, she immediately frowned: "I didn't expect this force to appear again, but it is unlikely to be the Heaven Swallowing Sect, the Heaven Swallowing Sect has been destroyed, it should just be a small force that has obtained the inheritance of the Heaven Swallowing Sect." Of course, if the other party has been cultivating the Heaven Snatching Technique for a long time, and now his strength is not weak, maybe he really has a controller comparable to the Seven Realms or even the Eighth Realm level. "

Immediately, the Snow Maiden told Ye Tian: "Little junior brother, if you have obtained the Heaven Snatching Technique, don't be tempted by it, this secret technique is flawed. "

"What flaw?" Ye Tian asked.

The Snow Girl introduced: "The Heaven Snatching Technique is to take away the changes and perceptions of others in the Dao, but once you take away the perceptions of others, you will lose something, such as losing your original heart, will, and even the aversion of your origin. Once you cultivate the Heaven Snatching Technique for too long, after being rejected by the Origin Realm Sea, you will not even be able to be immortal forever, which means that there will be a problem of lifespan. The Eternal Master was originally beyond the lifespan limit, but the Heaven Capture Technique will make the lifespan limit come again, although it can still live for a long time, but there will be a day when it falls. But even so, there are still people who can't resist the temptation to cultivate it. Moreover, many Eternal Inheritors who had cultivated the Heaven Snatching Technique firmly believed that once they surpassed the Ten Realm-level Masters and did not reach the level of the Master, they would ignore the aversion of the Origin Realm Sea and would no longer be limited by their lifespan. So, they're crazy, and their goal is to become like their master. Even, they felt that the Heaven Snatching Technique gave them hope to break through the level of the master and enter a new realm. "

"It's so crazy. "

Ye Tian was surprised.

I have to say that the Heaven Snatching Technique is indeed terrifying, but the sequelae are too great, and he won't be able to practice if he gives it to him!

After all, he has an infinite future, so why destroy his foundation.

Subsequently.

The Snow Girl gave Ye Tian a communicator, asking him to send her a message immediately if there was a situation or danger, and she would come immediately.

"Fourth Senior Sister, I'll leave first!"

Ye Tiandao.

Then, Ye Tian left Wanyuan Mountain and went to find the inheritance of the inheritor of the Heaven Devouring Sect in person.

Time passed slowly, and in the thirteenth boundary river, there were still Eternal Masters who were killed, but the opponent's jumping targets were all weaker Eternal Masters, so it was difficult to catch the opponent's traces.

And.

There are too many Eternal Masters to oversee alone.

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to use the method of waiting for the rabbit, guarding a weaker second-domain level eternal master, secretly stalking, if anyone killed him, he could catch the other party.

This second-level master, named Bai Hua Master, is a very ancient eternal master, and has mastered a lot of changes in the way of time, so he is likely to be targeted.

The main thing is that the white birch controller has been traveling a lot lately.

"I hope someone will do something to the white birch master. "

Ye Tian said darkly.
